title: AGENTS.md — Add E3 self-archive policy (4 triggers + 3 anti-loop + 顺手归档 template)
description: Append a new policy section to AGENTS.md instructing AI to self-trigger fabric-archive when 4 specific signals appear in the current session, with 3 anti-loop guards and a fixed presentation template. This policy works at the prompt/AGENTS layer (no code), trained per Claude/Codex/Cursor managed-block sync via `fab install`. Resolves Gap #4 (chat-only guideline signals that hook misses) by giving AI explicit authority + trigger conditions to invoke fabric-archive mid-session.

files.target: after 知识库(KB) section, before Cite policy section (between line ~10 and ~15)
files.change: Insert new H2 section '## Self-archive policy' with the full E3 policy text (see implementation steps for verbatim content). zh-CN narrative per project's fabric_language=zh-CN setting.
Mirror the same Self-archive policy section in the template source, so `fab install` syncs to all 3 client managed blocks (Claude / Codex / Cursor).

implementation: Read .fabric/AGENTS.md current state to confirm insertion point (between KB section and Cite policy section).

Insert verbatim section text:

## Self-archive policy

- **触发**: 本会话出现以下任一信号, 在该 turn 回复末尾自主调用 `fabric-archive` skill (E3-strong mode):
  1. **Normative 语言** — 用户消息出现 `以后` / `always` / `never` / `from now on` / `下次注意` / `记一下` / `永远不要`
  2. **Wrong-turn-and-revert** — AI 尝试 path X, 反思后改走 path Y (尤其当 path X 是非显然踩坑)
  3. **Decision confirmation** — 用户在 ≥2 候选中权衡后给出 rationale 锁定方向
  4. **Explicit dismissal with reason** — 用户拒了某建议**并**说了原因

- **Anti-trigger** (明确不触发):
  - 用户纯询问 (无 normative 表达)
  - 简单 refactor / typo fix
  - AI 自己产生的'洞察' (必须由用户消息中信号触发)

- **Anti-loop 三条防护**:
  - 同 turn 最多自调 1 次
  - 同 session 同 outcome 不重复 (若 user_dismissed, 本会话不再自调相同主题)
  - Phase 0.5 viability gate 兜底 (skill 内部仍跑 gate, AI 判错不会乱写 pending)

- **呈现模板** (turn 末尾插入, 一行简洁版):
  ```
  顺手归档: 注意到你说 `<触发短语>`, 已调用 fabric-archive 抓 N 条候选 → .fabric/knowledge/pending/...
  若不该记, 答 '撤销' 我会调 fab_review reject。
  ```
Mirror the same section in packages/cli/templates/.fabric/AGENTS.md.
Verify section doesn't break existing AGENTS.md structure (no duplicate H2, no broken markdown).
Do NOT modify the agents.meta.json (per existing policy 'agents.meta.json 严禁手动编辑').

reference.pattern: rc.20 cite policy AGENTS.md section is the structural precedent — same Managed Block convention, same bilingual prose, same protected-token preservation
reference.examples: rc.20 cite policy section format (Cite policy H2 with 触发/dismissed reason/sentinel/稽核 subsections)

rationale.chosen_approach: AGENTS.md-only policy text (zero code change). AI compliance through prose policy has rc.20 cite policy precedent — works reliably for capable models (Claude Opus 4.x, GPT-5, Gemini 3.x).
alternatives_considered: E3-soft (AI asks user first — rejected: introduces interruption per Q3.5)
Hard-code trigger detection in skill (rejected: AGENTS.md is the standard place for AI behavior rules)
Skip E3 entirely (rejected: Gap #4 chat guideline signals would be permanently lost)
decision_factors: Zero code change, fastest to ship
AGENTS.md sync via fab install already established
Phase 0.5 viability gate兜底 means AI误判 cost is bounded
rationale.tradeoffs: Effectiveness depends on AI instruction-following quality. Mitigation: Phase 0.5 catches false positives; user can dismiss erroneous candidates.
